overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring the sunlit Mediterranean-inspired city of Toussaint. The character walks through cobblestone courtyards with waterfalls, open plazas with ornate gazebos overlooking the sea, and elevated terraces with panoramic coastal views before ascending a grand staircase.

events.description: Geralt slows slightly while approaching the mist from the waterfall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through the stone courtyard toward the tiered waterfall, passing potted flowers on the left

notable_agents.action: seated on stone bench near the archway entrance

entered.detail: Stone building with arched windows and doorways featuring Gothic architectural details
Multi-level stone fountain with cascading water and mist at the base
Mature tree with silvery-green foliage casting dappled shadows on the ground
Large pots containing red flowering plants placed near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a sunlit stone courtyard with cobblestone paving, approaching a central tiered waterfall. A Gothic building with arched doorways stands to the left while a large olive tree provides shade on the right. The scene is quiet with only one NPC seated near the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with gazebo overlooking the sea

events.description: exits the enclosed courtyard into an open plaza with views of the sea and distant gazebo
Geralt turns right to follow the curved path around a large central tree

agents.ego_description: Geralt turns right and walks through the sunlit plaza, passing other pedestrians while heading toward the ornate gazebo

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress standing near the balcony railing looking out at the sea

entered.detail: Elaborate white stone pavilion with pointed red roof and Gothic spires
Bright blue ocean visible beyond the plaza balustrade
Low stone wall with arched openings overlooking the water
Raised planters with white flowers arranged around tree bases

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright plaza with full sky visibility, revealing an ornate gazebo and turquoise sea in the distance. Geralt walks past circular flower beds and a large shade tree while other pedestrians stroll through the area. The stone balcony railing lines the right side overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with panoramic coastal view

events.description: Geralt turns left to follow the curved terrace path, revealing the full coastal cityscape

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the curved terrace, pausing briefly to take in the panoramic view of the coastal city and mountains

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking in the opposite direction along the terrace

entered.detail: Stone balustrade with repeating Gothic arches providing safety along the cliff edge
Cluster of buildings with red roofs cascading down the hillside toward the water
Tall tower with clock face and crenellated top, part of a larger palace complex
Hazy blue mountains rising behind the coastal city

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along an elevated terrace with an arched stone railing, offering panoramic views of the coastal city, red-brick clock tower, and distant mountains. The sea stretches out to the left while birds fly overhead. The path curves gently, revealing more of the picturesque cityscape built into the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city approach with grand staircase

events.description: turns away from the open terrace back into the built environment with red-roof buildings
Geralt begins ascending the grand marble staircase toward the Gothic archway

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks away from the terrace view toward a grand staircase, passing other pedestrians before climbing the steps

notable_agents.action: man in colorful purple and yellow outfit walking up the stairs ahead of Geralt

entered.detail: Cream-colored stone structure with distinctive red tiled roof and arched windows
Wide stone steps with ornate carved edges leading upward to an archway
Elaborate pointed arch with decorative stonework marking the entrance to the upper level
Ornate white stone structure with multiple spires visible above the stairs

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns inland from the terrace and approaches a grand marble staircase flanked by a red-roof building and olive trees. He follows a colorfully dressed NPC up the wide stone steps toward an ornate Gothic archway, with a decorative pavilion visible to the right. The environment transitions from open coastal views back to the enclosed urban architecture of the upper city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded stone courtyard through open coastal vistas and finally back into the enclosed urban architecture of the upper city. It begins with Geralt walking across cobblestone paving toward a tiered waterfall, flanked by a Gothic building and a shading olive tree. As the path opens into a bright plaza, the view expands to reveal circular flower beds and an ornate gazebo overlooking a turquoise sea. The scene then shifts onto an elevated terrace with an arched railing, offering panoramic views of a red-brick clock tower and distant mountains before the path curves inland. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he turns away from the coast to ascend a grand marble staircase, moving past red-roofed buildings toward an ornate Gothic archway.
